title: bromus purgans var. laeviglumis
intro: Bromus purgans var. laeviglumis, also known as smooth cheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its purgative properties, which make it effective in treating digestive issues such as constipation and indigestion. The health benefits of Bromus purgans var. laeviglumis include reducing inflammation, relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and promoting bowel regularity. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
